mitigations: kept decoder-block final vector internal except the registered 64-bit final layer output
compressed top-level status to layer trace, block trace, q/k/v/o AXI metadata aggregate, and a marker
kept nested projection, AXI, KV-cache, residual, and MLP traces in simulation hierarchy
did not expose 128-bit AXI read data, AXI debug buses, child vectors, or child-wide status arrays

timing_margin_note: Prior decoder_block_axi_attention_mlp_fixture routed WHS was 0.012 ns with 244 bonded IOB; this Layer FSM keeps status at 64 bits and avoids exposing child AXI/package debug paths.
verilator_status_policy: Verilator lint result recorded when verification.enable_verilator is true
vivado_timing_status_policy: post-route with non-NA setup/hold/pulse-width when synthesis is enabled
vivado_resource_status_policy: utilization.rpt emitted when Vivado synthesis completes
timing_caveat: Routed timing is fixture timing without board-level I/O delay, DDR/AXI shell, or PS/PL integration constraints; it is not board-level ZCU104 signoff.
omitted_operations: true SiLU or exponential activation math in RTL
